changes.old: Greet caller; identify if emergency. Emergencies (calls. We have a dedicated on-call guy, but callers don't always get straight through...): collect name, number, address → transfer to on-call technician; if transfer fails after 60s, assure callback within 10 min. Emergencies (what exactly should Clara treat as a confirmed emergency?...): collect name, number, address → transfer to 614-555-0182; if transfer fails after 45s, assure callback within 10 min. Non-emergencies: collect name, number, issue → confirm next-business-day callback.
